title: Sutton SignWriting Infrastructure and Program
subtitle: Continuity, stewardship structure, AI/data governance, and the practical program behind the Sutton SignWriting platform
description: A stewardship and program-design series for the Sutton SignWriting platform: stewardship models, continuity requirements, infrastructure reality, international participation, country-level coordination, AI/data governance boundaries, and the institutional structures that make the work cumulative.
